name: CYABRA, INC.
business: Trailblazer Holdings, Inc. is a blank check company formed on July 16, 2024 for the sole purpose of entering into a business combination. It has no assets, operations or liabilities. The company has selected December 31 as its fiscal year end.

catalysts.event: Outside closing date of the Merger Agreement amended to February 1, 2026.
catalysts.sentence: amend the outside closing date from March 1, 2025 to February 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Combination Period: if Business Combination not consummated by March 30, 2026, Holdings will cease operations.
catalysts.sentence: If the Business Combination is not consummated by March 30, 2026 (the Combination Period), then Holdings will cease all operations except for the purpose of liquidating.

catalysts.event: PIPE Investment to close concurrently with the closing of the Business Combination.
catalysts.sentence: Holdings entered into subscription agreements with certain PIPE investors providing for aggregate investments in the amount of no less than $6,000,000 in Holdings Series B Preferred Stock in a private placement that will close concurrently with the closing of the Business Combination.

catalysts.event: Additional PIPE Investment of $2.0 million on February 5, 2026.
catalysts.sentence: On February 5, 2026, Holdings entered into additional subscription agreements with certain investors providing for an additional $2.0 million private placement investment in Holdings Series B Preferred Stock and warrants.
